hero.headline: Great coffee. Good people.
hero.subheading: Freshly roasted, made to order. Find us in the heart of Tenterden.

faq.question: Do you have parking nearby?
faq.answer: Yes — there is a free car park on Recreation Ground Road, a 2-minute walk away.

faq.question: Do you cater for dietary requirements?
faq.answer: Yes. We offer plant-based milks, gluten-free options, and can adapt most dishes. Ask a member of staff.

faq.question: Can I book a table?
faq.answer: We're walk-in only. During busy periods we operate a short waiting list at the door.
